May 18–21, 2026 • Vancouver, BC

The Kyla Turns 40 Experience

Join me for a few unforgettable days of fun, laughter, and memories in beautiful Vancouver.

Birthday Week Itinerary

You're welcome to come for as much or as little of the birthday week as you'd like. The main celebration will be May 20, 2026.

Monday18
May 18
🌺

Welcome Party

5 PM
Kyla's House
Tiki theme, tiki cocktails, costume contest
Tuesday19
May 19
🥂

Brunch

11 AM
Fable Diner (151 E Broadway)
🥩

Steakhouse Dinner

6 PM
Riley's Steakhouse (200 Burrard St.)
Private dining in the covered and heated garden patio. RSVP early as seating is limited
Wednesday20
May 20
🎉

Birthday Party

2 PM - 6 PM
GoodCo (965 Granville St)
🛥️

Luxury Yacht Charter

7 PM - 11 PM
The Marina (1601 Bayshore Dr)
DO NOT BE LATE
Thursday21
May 21
🍳

Hangover Brunch & Paul's Birthday Toast

10 AM
Slate (670 Smithe St.)
🍣

Sushi Dinner

6 PM
O Lounge at Coast (1054 Alberni St.)

Where to Stay

There are many lovely places to stay in Vancouver. You can also book through AirBNB or VRBO.

🏛️
Fairmont Hotel Vancouver
$$$

Downtown near luxury shopping (Dior, LV, Hermes). Older but upgraded; close to Skytrain.

🌊
Fairmont Waterfront / Pacific Rim
$$$$

Share property at Canada Place with amazing views but expensive; Canada Line Skytrain nearby.

🎰
JW Marriott / The Joseph
$$$

Located at Parq Casino; higher-end yet more affordable than Fairmont; walkable to downtown.

🏨
Hampton Inn & Suites
$$

Across from BC Place; 10-minute walk to downtown; budget friendly.

💆
Wedgewood Hotel & Spa
$$$

Best spa hotel in Vancouver; mid-range pricing.

🌹
Rosedale on Robson
$$

Affordable and quiet; central and walkable.

Safety Note
Avoid East Hastings and Granville Entertainment District. If staying outside downtown, choose places near SkyTrain stations for easy access.

Things to Do in Vancouver

Nature meets city — west-coast vibes, multicultural food, and walkable neighbourhoods.
